name: ROKU, INC
summary: Roku, Inc. is the leading TV streaming platform in the United States, Canada, and Mexico by hours streamed. The company operates the Roku TV OS, a purpose-built television operating system powering Roku streaming devices including streaming players, Roku-made TVs, and licensed Roku TV partner models. Roku connects viewers to content, enables content partners to monetize audiences, and provides advertisers with digital advertising capabilities. Revenue streams include platform advertising, content distribution, and hardware device sales.
